notes: Pulled by scripts/pull_tn_court_rules.py. Tennessee AOC publishes the statewide rule sets as Drupal HTML with one sub-page per rule. The puller walks each rule set's landing page, discovers sub-page URLs by path prefix, and extracts the rule body from the `field--name-field-rules-rule-content` div. County-by-county local rules are pointer stubs (no aggregated HTML index).
